verbGlossary.ACCOMPANIES: {source}is submitted alongside a bid as a guarantee of the bidder's intent to honor their price
verbGlossary.APPLIES TO: {source}requirement applies to {target} on public or regulated work
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKS: {source}measure benchmarks the performance or cost growth of {target} instrument
verbGlossary.BOUND BY: {target} is legally bound by the general conditions and administrative terms
verbGlossary.CONFIRMS: {target} confirms that all warranty obligations and deliverables are in place
verbGlossary.DEFINED BY: {target} work is defined by a detailed scope of work exhibit
verbGlossary.DEFINES: {target} exhibit defines the technical content of a bid package for solicitation
verbGlossary.ESTABLISHES: {target} establish the specific contract terms and requirements that govern the project
verbGlossary.EVALUATED IN: {source}is evaluated in the bid leveling and comparison process
verbGlossary.EXECUTES: {source} or notice to proceed results in the execution of {target} instrument
verbGlossary.FLOWS DOWN TO: {target} terms, conditions, and obligations flow down to subordinate contracts
verbGlossary.GOVERNS: {target} governs the commercial terms of individual contracts issued under it
verbGlossary.GUARANTEES COMPLETION OF: {target} guarantees that the contractor will complete the contracted scope of work
verbGlossary.INCLUDES: {target} or document package includes a specific exhibit, term, or certification
verbGlossary.INCORPORATES: {source}formally incorporates a set of terms or exhibits by reference
verbGlossary.INFORMS: A measure or metric informs a procurement decision or evaluation process
verbGlossary.INSURES UNDER: {target} policy provides property damage coverage under the prime contract
verbGlossary.MANDATES: {target} mandate a specific compliance requirement on all contracted parties
verbGlossary.MEASURES COMPETITIVENESS OF: {source} the competitive coverage of procurement across {target}s
verbGlossary.MEASURES DEPTH OF: {source} the depth of market competition on a procurement package
verbGlossary.MEASURES SPEED OF: {source} the elapsed time efficiency of a procurement milestone
verbGlossary.PRECEDES: {source}must be achieved before the next milestone can occur
verbGlossary.QUALIFIES BIDDERS FOR: {target} vets contractors and determines who is eligible to bid on a package
verbGlossary.RECOMMENDS: {target} process recommends a contractor for award and notice to proceed
verbGlossary.REFERENCES: {target} references another document or exhibit without full incorporation
verbGlossary.REQUIRED FOR: A document or certification is required for {target} instrument to be valid or active
verbGlossary.REQUIRES: {source}requires the completion or delivery of a specific document or action
verbGlossary.SCREENS FOR: {target} or RFQ process screens contractors for eligibility on a specific solicitation
verbGlossary.SECURES PAYMENT ON: {source} secures the obligation to pay subcontractors and suppliers on {target}
verbGlossary.SHORTLISTS FOR: {target} process shortlists qualified contractors who will be invited to submit proposals
verbGlossary.SOLICITS: {target} solicits competitive proposals from qualified contractors
verbGlossary.SOLICITS PRICING FOR: {target} solicits detailed pricing and approach for a specific bid package scope
verbGlossary.SPECIFIES: {target} specify the warranty duration and obligations for contracted work
verbGlossary.STARTS: {target} starts the warranty period for the contracted scope of work
verbGlossary.SUBJECT TO: {target} is subject to a specific financial or schedule term
verbGlossary.TRACKED DURING: {source}is tracked during the procurement evaluation process
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS FINAL RELEASE UNDER: {source}triggers the final release of withheld retainage under {target} terms
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS RELEASE UNDER: {source} triggers the initial release of retainage under {target} terms
